slide1.title: A shared space for your relationship
slide1.description: OurSparks helps couples feel closer through connection, care, and shared moments.

slide2.title: Ask, play, chat, and grow together
slide2.description: Explore thoughtful questions, playful games, private chat, goals, memories, and more.

slide3.title: Tailored to your relationship
slide3.description: Your experience can adapt to your stage, your language, and what matters most to both of you.

relationshipStage.title: Where are you in your relationship?
relationshipStage.subtitle: We’ll use this to personalize your experience.

boyfriendGirlfriend.title: Boyfriend & girlfriend
boyfriendGirlfriend.description: A committed relationship with deeper bonding.

engaged.title: Engaged
engaged.description: Planning a future and growing together.

married.title: Married
married.description: Marriage, teamwork, intimacy, and long-term growth.

longDistance.title: Long distance
longDistance.description: Connection across distance, visits, and virtual closeness.

custom.title: Custom
custom.description: Define your relationship your own way.
